clusters.justification: This domain encompasses the processing of emotional valences, physiological arousal, and mood state regulation, which functionally co-activate within the brain's salience and cortico-limbic systems.
This domain captures the appraisal of incentives, reinforcement-based decision-making, and motivation driven by ventromedial prefrontal and striatal reward circuitries.
This domain integrates self-referential thought, autobiographical retrieval, and the perception of others, reflecting the internally-directed cognitive axis subserved by the default mode network.
